character.definition: sound of yelling while towing a boat; (Sanskrit) to call out
to stretch a bow, the bow decorated with colorful silk and leather, bent; curved
(same as large seal type form of 牭) four-year old cattle; two and a half year-old cattle
(non-classical form of 脈) the pulse, the veins or arteries
transcription of Sanskrit 'gha' in Buddhist texts ('samgha', etc.); nursing; attending; entertainer (Japanese); temple; in Chinese this character is not used alone
